choice.title: Uhh, hi.
choice.response: Don't be afraid, I won't bite.

choice.title: Ok, I'll take your word for it.
choice.response: What are you doing here?

choice.title: I'm here for the best deal ever.
choice.response: Ohh, let's introduce ourselves first.

choice.title: STR_SAY_PLAYER
choice.response: Well met, I'm Archibald...

choice.title: STR_SAY_ALIAS
choice.response: Well met, I'm Archibald...

choice.title: I'm Duffy the Demonslayer!
choice.response: I'll send you back to Bunnyvale.

choice.title: Nice.
choice.response: Cummingston the III.

choice.title: Cool.
choice.response: But you can call me Archie.

choice.title: Ok, Archie, why am I here?
choice.response: You are here to invest in your future.

choice.title: And how would I do that?
choice.response: You sell a portion of your soul to me...

choice.title: Uhh...
choice.response: And I will give you access to great power!

choice.title: Wow, just like that?
choice.response: Yes, all you have to do is...

choice.title: Sit on a couch and get railed by infernals?
choice.response: Haha, no, sign this standard contract...

choice.title: I knew it! With my blood, right?
choice.response: With your blood.

choice.title: Wow, that's so original.
choice.response: That's why it's called a standard contract.

choice.title: So, basically it's take it or leave it?
choice.response: Do you want to see the contract or not?

choice.title: Yes.
choice.response: Talk to me again once you've signed it.

choice.title: No.
choice.response: Well, it's your loss.

choice.title: Yes.
choice.response: Excellent! I'll take that and you can have this...

choice.title: No.
choice.response: Well, I don't have all day.

choice.title: What's that?
choice.response: Let me go through the fine print first...

choice.title: Ok.
choice.response: So, in exchange of 99% of your soul...

choice.title: Wait, what, it was 1% in the contract!
choice.response: No, the contract says that you get to keep 1%.

choice.title: So, I got railed by a used wagon salesman.
choice.response: Nah, you just signed something with blood...

choice.title: Uhuh?
choice.response: That you clearly couldn't fully understand...

choice.title: Damn it!
choice.response: That happens to almost every person.

choice.title: Fine. Let's hear the fine print then.
choice.response: So, in exchange of 99% of your soul...

choice.title: Blah, blah.
choice.response: You will receive this strange device...

choice.title: Yada, yada.
choice.response: That allows you to siphon souls and...

choice.title: Wow.
choice.response: Keep some of that siphoned energy...

choice.title: This just keeps getting better.
choice.response: To give you unimaginable power!

choice.title: Great. Just what I needed!
choice.response: Ohh, one more thing.

choice.title: What's that?
choice.response: Souls cannot be just taken unless...

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: The target is properly angered or gullible...

choice.title: Like me?
choice.response: Uhm, kind of, but fortunately for you...

choice.title: Uhuh?
choice.response: The device can help you with angering...

choice.title: Really?
choice.response: Your prey enough for their souls to depart.

choice.title: So, basically, I have to murder for you?
choice.response: No, no, no. You murder for yourself...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And I take most of the siphoned souls.

choice.title: So, it was an employment contract?
choice.response: Standard perpetual servitude contract.

choice.title: Wait, what, perpetual servitude?
choice.response: Your numerous offsprings will love you for it.

choice.title: Somehow I doubt that.
choice.response: Happy hunting and welcome to the dark side!
